name: Victory Flows from the Turning of Tides
title: Nefer: Victory Flows from the Turning of Tides
in_play_description: After your Nefer deals DMG with Phantasm Performance: Draw 1 card, and grant Cost Reduction to all Seeds of Deceit in your Hand and deck. (Twice per Round)

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Nefer to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

skills.desc:
Fast Action: Equip this to your Nefer.
Create 3 Seeds of Deceit, place them evenly into your deck, and grant Cost Reduction to all Seeds of Deceit cards in your Hand and deck.
After your Nefer deals DMG with Phantasm Performance: Draw 1 card, and grant Cost Reduction to all Seeds of Deceit cards in your Hand and deck. (Twice per Round)
(You must have Nefer in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
